title: Storage Classes — Reclaim policy
text:
PersistentVolumes that are dynamically created by a StorageClass will have the
reclaim policy
specified in the
reclaimPolicy
field of the class, which can be
either
Delete
or
Retain
. If no
reclaimPolicy
is specified when a
StorageClass object is created, it will default to
Delete
.
PersistentVolumes that are created manually and managed via a StorageClass will have
whatever reclaim policy they were assigned at creation.
